# MODRACX — Kenneth D'Silva
# https://modracx.github.io/

> Kenneth D'Silva is a full-stack web developer specializing in Magento and Shopify
> ecommerce engineering, CMS builds, ERP/IMS systems, SEO, and security-focused delivery.
> Available globally for freelance, contract, and retained support work.

## About

Kenneth D'Silva (brand: MODRACX) is an independent developer with 8+ years building
ecommerce storefronts, CMS platforms, ERP systems, and custom web applications.
Current specialization: Magento 2 and Shopify. Broader range includes WordPress,
Laravel, Vue, React, Next.js, Angular, Odoo, Shopware, PrestaShop, and custom PHP/JS stacks.

## Services

- Ecommerce Engineering: Magento 2, Shopify, Shopify Plus storefront builds,
  theme work, custom extensions, integrations, checkout optimization, SEO and performance.
- CMS & Business Sites: WordPress, Laravel, Wix, Squarespace, custom PHP/JS marketing sites.
- ERP / IMS / HRM: Role-based dashboards, inventory, reporting, workflow systems, admin UIs.
- SEO + Security: Technical SEO, on-page structure, schema, platform hardening, patching.
- Support & Migrations: Post-launch work, rebuilds, redesigns, ongoing optimization.

## Portfolio Highlights

- Commerce Delivery: Magento/Shopify builds, storefront themes, integrations, security.
- Spruha Healthcare: Custom rental commerce system for medical equipment.
- Diak Torad: Academic ERP with role-based access for admins, teachers, students.
- CBL/CVL: Real-time score applications with live data and event-driven UI.
- MbFinance: Financial services lead-generation website.
- ADEI: Emotion-detection product experiment (ML + interface).
- Invyte: Open-source Magento inventory management (Lumen + Vue).

## Technology Stack

Magento 2, Shopify, Shopify Plus, WordPress, Laravel, Vue.js, React, Next.js,
Angular, PHP, JavaScript, TypeScript, SQL, Hyva, Luma, Breeze, Liquid,
GraphQL, REST APIs, Wix, Squarespace, Odoo, Shopware, PrestaShop.

Available for projects. Based globally. Open to freelance, contract,
retained support, and team collaboration.
